data.name: Mock_FullExamDesc
data.value: Four sections in sequence: Listening → Reading → Writing → Speaking (~2.5 hours). Final overall band calculated using the official IELTS rounding formula.

data.name: ReadIelts_PracticeTooltip
data.value: Exam-only tests can only be launched in strict exam mode.

data.name: Speaking_RandomTopicHint
data.value: 🎲 A topic will be chosen randomly at the start of the session.

data.name: Reader_TranscriptionTooltip
data.value: Show the [IPA] transcription above every word

data.name: Dict_HideStubsTooltip
data.value: Hides words with no English/Russian meanings (newly added)

data.name: Dict_FilterByTagTooltip
data.value: Filter by tag (AWL sublist, AVL band, IELTS Writing category, …)

data.name: Dict_SelectWord
data.value: Select a word from the list on the left

data.name: Dict_SelectWordHint
data.value: Tip: use search or CEFR-level filters

data.name: Dict_PronunciationTooltip
data.value: Pronunciation practice via Whisper (model ~142 MB, downloaded once)

data.name: Dict_PronunciationHint
data.value: Listen to the reference, then record your attempt. Whisper.net transcribes the audio; score is similarity 0–100.

data.name: Listening_BreakdownHeading
data.value: Breakdown by parts and question types

data.name: Writing_HubDescription
data.value: Full test = Task 1 (≥150 words / 20 min) + Task 2 (≥250 words / 40 min), total timer 60 minutes. After completion, AI scores each task on 4 criteria, band 0–9.

data.name: Writing_DetailsTooltip
data.value: Band progress chart + detailed list of all attempts

data.name: Writing_ClearTooltip
data.value: Delete all records of completed tests

data.name: Writing_OverallScoreFormula
data.value: Calculated using the official IELTS formula: Task 1 weight ⅓, Task 2 — ⅔. Rounded to the nearest 0.5.

data.name: Writing_HistorySubtitle
data.value: Weekly band progress + detailed breakdown of attempts

data.name: Writing_NoChartData
data.value: No chart data yet — complete at least one test first.

data.name: Reader_PracticeTooltip
data.value: Pronunciation practice: listen and repeat sentence by sentence

data.name: Reader_AddToTextPoolTooltip
data.value: Add word to this text's practice pool

data.name: Reader_NoData
data.value: No data — read at least one text aloud.

data.name: ReadStudy_PronUnavailable
data.value: 🎧 Pronunciation analysis unavailable (recogniser not ready). Showing speed and coverage.

data.name: ReadStudy_ClearHistoryTip
data.value: Delete all reading history for this text

data.name: ReadStudy_NoNotes
data.value: No notes yet. Select a passage in the text and press "✎ Note".

data.name: ReadStudy_WordsMarkUnknown
data.value: words · mark unfamiliar ones to study before reading

data.name: ReadStudy_ClaudeUnavailable
data.value: ⚠ Claude unavailable — words without a translation cannot be added.

data.name: ReadStudy_AiWordTip
data.value: Not in dictionary — Claude will create a card when added

data.name: Content_ImportHint
data.value: Choose a folder or ZIP archive with the content pack (IELTS tests, audio, dictionary). It must contain a manifest.json.

data.name: Settings_AiHint
data.value: Essays and speaking answers are scored via the Claude CLI using your Claude Max subscription. Install: 'claude code' via npm or the official installer.

data.name: Settings_MicHint
data.value: Recording device for pronunciation practice and IELTS Speaking. Start the test, speak into the mic and watch the signal level, then play back the test recording.

data.name: Settings_WhisperHint
data.value: The model is downloaded on first use. Base is enough for word pronunciation practice; Medium is recommended for IELTS Speaking.

data.name: Settings_VoicesHint
data.value: Name of an installed Windows voice (e.g. 'Microsoft Sonia Online (Natural) - English (United Kingdom)'). Empty = use the first available voice for the matching region/gender.

data.name: Settings_PexelsHint
data.value: With a key, word-card images come from Pexels (nicer). Without a key — Wikipedia/Commons. Sign up: pexels.com/api

data.name: Settings_ContentHint
data.value: IELTS tests, audio and the Oxford 5000 dictionary ship as a separate content pack. Import a folder or ZIP to populate the app's sections.

data.name: Settings_ThemeHint
data.value: Changes the whole app's appearance instantly, without a restart.

data.name: Mock_HintWindowed
data.value: This section will open in a separate window. Complete it to return to the exam.

data.name: Mock_HintInline
data.value: The section timer will start after you click "Start Section".

data.name: Mock_WritingRunning
data.value: Writing is running in a separate window. Complete both tasks to continue.

data.name: Mock_SpeakingRunning
data.value: Speaking is running in a separate window. Complete all parts to continue.

data.name: Mock_ContentMissingDefault
data.value: The full exam consists of Reading, Listening, Writing, and Speaking sections.

data.name: Mock_ContentMissingDetail
data.value: The full exam consists of Reading, Listening, Writing, and Speaking sections. Missing: {0}. Please import a content pack.

data.name: Mock_NoBundles
data.value: No bundles found. Imported Cambridge Speaking/Listening/Reading content is required.

data.name: Mock_DiscardMessage
data.value: Discard and delete the unfinished exam? Completed sections will not be removed from their modules.

data.name: Mock_ClearHistoryMessage
data.value: Delete all mock exam records? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Mock_OpenBreakdownFailed
data.value: Failed to open breakdown for section {0}.

data.name: Speaking_ContentMissingText
data.value: The IELTS Speaking topic bank is part of the content pack. Import the pack to unlock this section.

data.name: Speaking_ModeDescFullMock
data.value: Full mock exam: Part 1 (4–5 min) + Part 2 (1 min prep + 2 min response) + Part 3 (4–5 min). Topic is chosen randomly.

data.name: Speaking_ModeDescPart1Only
data.value: Part 1 only: 5 short questions on the selected topic, 30 seconds per answer.

data.name: Speaking_ModeDescPart2Only
data.value: Part 2 only: cue card with 1 minute of preparation and 2 minutes to speak.

data.name: Speaking_ModeDescPart3Only
data.value: Part 3 only: 4–5 in-depth follow-up questions on the selected topic, 60 seconds each.

data.name: Speaking_ContentNotLoadedYet
data.value: Speaking content has not been loaded yet. Restart the app after the seed data is delivered.

data.name: Speaking_FailedToLoadTopics
data.value: Failed to load the topic list.

data.name: Speaking_WhisperModelFailed
data.value: Failed to download the Whisper medium model. Speaking session is unavailable.

data.name: Speaking_ClearHistoryConfirm
data.value: Delete all records of completed Speaking tests? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Writing_ContentMissing
data.value: IELTS Writing tasks are part of the content pack. Import the pack to unlock this section.

data.name: Writing_NoTestsLoaded
data.value: No tests loaded yet. Restart the app to import seed data.

data.name: Writing_LoadTestsFailed
data.value: Failed to load the test list.

data.name: Writing_ClearHistoryBody
data.value: Delete all completed Writing test records? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Writing_AnswerSavedNoAi
data.value: Answer saved. AI evaluation unavailable (Claude CLI is not configured or did not respond).

data.name: Writing_AnswerSavedAiFailed
data.value: Answer saved, but AI evaluation failed:

data.name: Writing_ReevaluatingBothTasks
data.value: Re-running AI evaluation for both tasks…

data.name: Listening_AiStatusPrompt
data.value: Press "AI Review" to get an explanation of your mistakes and tips.

data.name: Listening_AiStatusUnavailable
data.value: Claude CLI is not configured — this section is available after installation.

data.name: Listening_AiStatusProcessing
data.value: Claude is processing your result — this takes 1–3 minutes…

data.name: Listening_AiStatusEmptyResponse
data.value: Claude CLI returned an empty or invalid response. Please try again.

data.name: Listening_AiStatusError
data.value: Error calling Claude CLI. See logs for details.

data.name: Listening_ContentMissing
data.value: IELTS Listening tests (with audio) are part of the content pack. Import the pack to unlock this section.

data.name: Listening_NoTestsInSeed
data.value: No Listening tests have been added to the seed yet.

data.name: Listening_LoadTestsFailed
data.value: Failed to load the test list.

data.name: Listening_ClearHistoryConfirm
data.value: Delete all Listening attempt history ({0} record(s))? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ReadStudy_NoTextsYet
data.value: No texts yet. Click "Add text" to paste your own.

data.name: ReadStudy_LoadTextsFailed
data.value: Failed to load the text list.

data.name: ReadStudy_NoTextsFilter
data.value: No texts match the selected filter.

data.name: ReadStudy_LargeTextBody
data.value: This text has ~{0:N0} words. The Reading module is designed for stories and chapters — texts over {1:N0} words (e.g. whole books) may open very slowly or freeze the reader window. Add anyway?

data.name: ReadStudy_DeleteTextBody
data.value: Delete "{0}"? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ReadStudy_ShadowNoSentences
data.value: Could not split the text into sentences.

data.name: ReadStudy_ShadowNoTts
data.value: No TTS voices found — playback unavailable (you can still record your repetition).

data.name: ReadStudy_ShadowNoMic
data.value: Microphone unavailable — recording your repetition is not possible.

data.name: ReadStudy_LoadModelFailed
data.value: Failed to load the speech recognizer.

data.name: ReadStudy_PreTeachNoUnknown
data.value: No unfamiliar words found — you can start reading right away.

data.name: ReadStudy_PreTeachAddedCount
data.value: Added to study: {0}. You can start reading now.

data.name: ReadStudy_PreTeachAddFailed
data.value: Failed to add words to study.

data.name: ReadStudy_PreTeachAiWillAdd
data.value: 🤖 will be looked up on add

data.name: ReadStudy_ClearHistoryBody
data.value: Delete all reading history for this text? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: ReadStudy_ComprehensionNoQuestions
data.value: Could not generate questions for this text.

data.name: ReadStudy_ComprehensionOffline
data.value: Questions unavailable offline — connect Claude CLI in settings.

data.name: ReadStudy_ProgressNoData
data.value: No completed read-aloud sessions yet — stats will appear after the first one.

data.name: ReadStudy_LookupNoCliOffline
data.value: Not in dictionary. Claude CLI is unavailable — connect it in settings for auto-translation.

data.name: Dict_ContentMissingText
data.value: The Oxford 5000 dictionary is part of the content pack. Import the pack to open the dictionary (the AWL/AVL skeleton without Oxford is of limited use).

data.name: Settings_WhisperBase
data.value: Base — fast (142 MB), for pronunciation practice

data.name: Settings_WhisperMedium
data.value: Medium — accurate (1.5 GB), for Speaking long-form

data.name: Settings_NoMicsFound
data.value: No microphones detected. Connect a device and press ⟳.

data.name: Settings_MicOpenFailed
data.value: Could not open microphone. Please choose a different device.

data.name: Settings_ClaudeNotFound
data.value: ✗ Not found. Install Claude CLI or enter the path manually.

data.name: Content_StatusInitial
data.value: Select a folder or ZIP with the content pack.

data.name: Content_ChooseFolderTitle
data.value: Select the content-pack folder (must contain manifest.json)

data.name: Content_ManifestNotFound
data.value: No manifest.json found in the selected pack.

data.name: Content_ManifestNoSections
data.value: Manifest found, but no sections are marked in it.

data.name: Content_ImportDoneWithErrors
data.value: Import completed with errors — see the list below.

data.name: ReadIelts_ContentMissingText
data.value: IELTS Reading tests are part of the content pack. Import the pack to open this section.

data.name: ReadIelts_NoTestsGenerated
data.value: No tests generated yet. Run tools/IeltsReadingGen for bulk generation.

data.name: ReadIelts_LoadTestsFailed
data.value: Failed to load the test list.

data.name: ReadIelts_ClearHistoryBody
data.value: Delete all Reading attempt history ({0} record(s))? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Trainer_PoolNoCards
data.value: This text's pool has no cards due for review yet.

data.name: Trainer_NoCards
data.value: No cards due for review. Add words in the dictionary using the 📚 Add to study button.

data.name: Shell_PlaceholderDescription
data.value: This section will appear in future updates.

data.name: Controls_ContentMissingDefault
data.value: Download or assemble a content pack and import it to unlock this section.

data.name: Whisper_DownloadingBase
data.value: Downloading Whisper base.en model (~142 MB, one-time)…

data.name: Whisper_DownloadingMedium
data.value: Downloading Whisper medium.en model (~1.5 GB, one-time)…

data.name: Whisper_PronUnrecognized
data.value: Could not recognize speech. Please try again.

data.name: Whisper_PronExcellent
data.value: Excellent! Pronunciation is close to the reference.

data.name: Whisper_PronGood
data.value: Good, but there are differences. Listen to the reference and try again.

data.name: Whisper_PronPoor
data.value: Pronunciation differs significantly. Listen to the reference and repeat.

data.name: App_UnexpectedErrorBody
data.value:
An unexpected error occurred. The app will keep running, but if problems persist, please restart it.
{0}

data.name: App_CrashPromptBody
data.value: The application terminated with an error during the previous run. Open the error-report folder?

data.name: Settings_BackupHint
data.value: Your training progress, exam attempts and notes live in a local database. Create a copy so a disk failure or reinstall can't wipe them out.

data.name: Settings_BackupNoDb
data.value: No database exists yet — nothing to back up.

data.name: Content_ErrManifestMissing
data.value: manifest.json was not found in the content pack.

data.name: Content_ErrUnsupportedVersion
data.value: Unsupported content-pack version: packVersion={0}; this app supports up to {1}. Please update the app.

data.name: Content_ErrSectionFileMissing
data.value: Section '{0}' is marked in the manifest but its key file is missing from the content pack.

data.name: Hub_AiUnavailable
data.value: Claude CLI not found — AI evaluation of essays and speaking is unavailable. Set the Claude CLI path in Settings.
